sendPrompt('Show me the Day 1-10 active daily pursuit sequence')
sendPrompt('Show me the Day 11-30 winding down sequence')

svg.text: No phone by Day 30 → email-only cold drip.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the Qualified Leads sequence')
sendPrompt('Show me the Nurture sequence for stalled qualified leads')

svg.text: Re-engages: WF-Response-Handler pauses drip, owner gets 7-day window.
Re-submitted: new source → WF-New-Lead-Entry → full Day 0 restart.
Qualified leads: AM works directly, no automated workflow.
Calls assigned to LM (cold email/SMS/call) or AM (direct mail/VAPI/referral/website).
